## Features

The author has made a
[whole wiki](https://github.com/DarioArzaba/Obsidian-Theme-Arzaba/wiki) on their
theme. Do read it if you are interested in its features.

## Criteria

|Criteria|Status|
|---|---|
|Dark/Light mode support|Both light and dark mode supported|
|One or multiple colour schemes|Multiple colour schemes for both light and dark mode|
|Value Propositions|See [Features](#features)|
|Accessibility|NIL|
|Style Settings support|Yes|
|Age of Theme|Released 27 September 2025|
|Last Updated|![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/DarioArzaba/Obsidian-Theme-Arzaba?color=573E7A&amp;label=last%20update&amp;logo=github&amp;style=for-the-badge)|
